description: Accounts Receivable transaction header table. Each record represents an invoice, debit memo, credit memo, chargeback, or bill receivable transaction and captures customer billing references, transaction dates, source details, ledger context, and order-to-cash processing attributes.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the receivables transaction. Used to relate the transaction header to transaction lines, schedules, and receipt applications.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: TRX_NUMBER
columns.description: Business transaction number assigned to the receivables document.

columns.name: CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the receivables transaction type that controls accounting and processing behavior.

columns.name: TRX_DATE
columns.description: Transaction date of the receivables document.

columns.name: SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
columns.description: Ledger identifier in which accounting entries are recorded.

columns.name: BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the bill-to contact associated with the customer transaction.

columns.name: BATCH_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the import, entry, or processing batch that grouped the transaction.

columns.name: BATCH_SOURCE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the transaction source used to create the receivables document.

columns.name: REASON_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying reason for the record.

columns.name: SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the sold-to customer account associated with the receivables transaction.

columns.name: SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related sold to contact record.

columns.name: SOLD_TO_SITE_USE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the sold-to site use associated with the transaction.

columns.name: BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID
columns.description: Customer account used as the bill-to party on the receivables transaction.

columns.name: BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the bill-to site use associated with the transaction.

columns.name: SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the ship-to customer account associated with the transaction.

columns.name: SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the ship-to contact associated with the transaction.

columns.name: SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the ship-to site use associated with the transaction.

columns.name: SHIPMENT_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related shipment record.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_ADDRESS_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related remit to address record.

columns.name: TERM_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related term record.

columns.name: TERM_DUE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with term due.

columns.name: PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related previous customer trx record.

columns.name: PRIMARY_SALESREP_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related primary salesrep record.

columns.name: PRINTING_ORIGINAL_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with printing original.

columns.name: PRINTING_LAST_PRINTED
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PRINTING_OPTION
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PRINTING_COUNT
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PRINTING_PENDING
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PURCHASE_ORDER
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PURCHASE_ORDER_REVISION
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PURCHASE_ORDER_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with purchase order.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_REFERENCE
columns.description: Business reference captured for customer.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with customer reference.

columns.name: COMMENTS
columns.description: Free-text explanation entered to document the business purpose of the record.

columns.name: INTERNAL_NOTES
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Conversion rate type used to derive the exchange rate for the transaction.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Date used to derive the foreign currency conversion rate.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Exchange rate used to convert the foreign currency transaction to functional currency.

columns.name: TERRITORY_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related territory record.

columns.name: INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: Currency in which the supplier invoice was entered.

columns.name: INITIAL_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related initial customer trx record.

columns.name: AGREEMENT_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related agreement record.

columns.name: END_DATE_COMMITMENT
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: START_DATE_COMMITMENT
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: LAST_PRINTED_SEQUENCE_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence last printed sequence.

columns.name: ORIG_SYSTEM_BATCH_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with orig system batch.

columns.name: POST_REQUEST_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related post request record.

columns.name: REQUEST_ID
columns.description: Concurrent request identifier for the program run that created or updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Oracle application identifier for the concurrent program that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_ID
columns.description: Concurrent program identifier for the process that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the concurrent program last updated the record.

columns.name: FINANCE_CHARGES
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: COMPLETE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether complete applies to the record.

columns.name: POSTING_CONTROL_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related posting control record.

columns.name: BILL_TO_ADDRESS_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related bill to address record.

columns.name: RA_POST_LOOP_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence ra post loop nu.

columns.name: SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related ship to address record.

columns.name: CREDIT_METHOD_FOR_RULES
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: CREDIT_METHOD_FOR_INSTALLMENTS
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: RECEIPT_METHOD_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the receipt method controlling customer receipt processing.

columns.name: RELATED_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related related customer trx record.

columns.name: INVOICING_RULE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related invoicing rule record.

columns.name: SHIP_VIA
columns.description: Shipping method or carrier reference associated with the transaction or customer account.

columns.name: SHIP_DATE_ACTUAL
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: WAYBILL_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence waybill nu.

columns.name: FOB_POINT
columns.description: Free On Board point that determines when ownership or shipping responsibility transfers.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the customer bank account used for receipt processing.

columns.name: INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT
columns.description: Context value used to interpret or derive interface header.

columns.name: DEFAULT_USSGL_TRX_CODE_CONTEXT
columns.description: Context value used to interpret or derive default ussgl trx code.

columns.name: DEFAULT_USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying default ussgl transaction for the record.

columns.name: RECURRED_FROM_TRX_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence recurred from trx nu.

columns.name: STATUS_TRX
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: DOC_SEQUENCE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the document sequencing definition used to assign the transaction number.

columns.name: DOC_SEQUENCE_VALUE
columns.description: Stored value associated with doc sequence.

columns.name: PAYING_CUSTOMER_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related paying customer record.

columns.name: PAYING_SITE_USE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related paying site use record.

columns.name: RELATED_BATCH_SOURCE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related related batch source record.

columns.name: DEFAULT_TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether default tax exempt applies to the record.

columns.name: CREATED_FROM
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier that owns the transaction in a multi-org Oracle EBS environment.

columns.name: WH_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with wh update.

columns.name: EDI_PROCESSED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether edi processed applies to the record.

columns.name: EDI_PROCESSED_STATUS
columns.description: Status value showing the current processing state of edi processed.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control mrc exchange rate processing.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with mrc exchange.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Rate used to calculate or value mrc exchange for the transaction.

columns.name: PAYMENT_SERVER_ORDER_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence payment server order.

columns.name: APPROVAL_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying approval for the record.

columns.name: ADDRESS_VERIFICATION_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying address verification for the record.

columns.name: OLD_TRX_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence old trx nu.

columns.name: BR_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing br for the transaction.

columns.name: BR_UNPAID_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether br unpaid applies to the record.

columns.name: BR_ON_HOLD_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether br on hold applies to the record.

columns.name: DRAWEE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related drawee record.

columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related drawee contact record.

columns.name: REMITTANCE_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID

columns.name: OVERRIDE_REMIT_ACCOUNT_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether override remit account applies to the record.

columns.name: DRAWEE_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related drawee bank account record.

columns.name: SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS

columns.name: REMITTANCE_BATCH_ID

columns.name: UPGRADE_METHOD

columns.description: Foreign key referencing the legal entity responsible for the transaction.

columns.name: REMIT_BANK_ACCT_USE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related remit bank acct use record.

columns.name: PAYMENT_TRXN_EXTENSION_ID

columns.name: AX_ACCOUNTED_FLAG

columns.name: INTEREST_HEADER_ID

business_questions: Show Accounts Receivable invoices and credit memos by customer.
Find customer transactions by transaction number and date.
Display receivables transactions by bill-to customer account.
Show transactions created from a specific batch source.
Identify completed, posted, or reversed receivables transactions.
List customer invoices with payment terms and due date context.
Show bill-to and ship-to customer references on a transaction.
Find receivables transactions associated with an order or interface source.
